channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ACCURACY] Accuracy Shipping Ltd Closes Trading Window for Dealing in Securities
item.description:
Accuracy Shipping Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities from 1st April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company’s Code of Conduct. All Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in securities of the Company during the period of closure of the Trading Window.

  • Trading window for dealing in securities of Accuracy Shipping Ltd to be closed from 1st April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Closure is in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company’s Code of Conduct
  • Designated Persons and their immediate relatives advised not to trade in securities of the Company during the period of closure of the Trading Window

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Accuracy Shipping Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [VALLEY] Valley Magnesite Company Ltd Closes Trading Window for Insider Trading Regulations Compliance
item.description:
Valley Magnesite Company Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all board members, officers, designated employees, and their dependent family members, in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and amendments thereafter. The closure will begin on 1st April 2026 and will reopen after 48 hours from the declaration of financial results for the year ending on 31st March 2026. The board meeting date for considering the financial results will be informed in due course.

  • Valley Magnesite Company Ltd closes trading window for insider trading regulations compliance.
  • Closure begins on 1st April 2026 and will reopen after 48 hours from the declaration of financial results for the year ending on 31st March 2026.
  • Board meeting date for considering the financial results will be informed in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Valley Magnesite Company Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SJCORP] Quantam Strategic Advisors LLP Acquires 6.57% Equity Shares of SJ Corporation Ltd on Preferential Basis
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Quantam Strategic Advisors LLP for the acquisition of 28,50,000 (6.57%) equity shares on a preferential basis. The acquisition was made through Giantans Stanegio Advinors LLP. Before the acquisition, the acquirer along with PACs held no shares, encumbrances, voting rights, or warrants/convertible securities in the target company. Post-acquisition, the acquirer along with PACs holds 28,50,000 shares, representing 6.57% of the total equity shares of the company. The securities were acquired through a preferential allotment. The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the target company after the acquisition is Rs. 4,33,55,000/- divided into 4,33,55,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each.

  • Quantam Strategic Advisors LLP acquires 6.57% equity shares of SJ Corporation Ltd on preferential basis
  • Acquisition made through Giantans Stanegio Advinors LLP
  • No shares, encumbrances, voting rights, or warrants/convertible securities held before the acquisition
  • Post-acquisition, acquirer holds 28,50,000 shares, representing 6.57% of the total equity shares
  • Securities acquired through preferential allotment

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SJ CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ICDSLTD] ICDS Ltd Closes Trading Window in Accordance with SEBI Regulations and Code of Conduct
item.description:
ICDS Ltd, in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct, has decided to close the trading window for dealing in shares of the Company for insiders. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026 until 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting for the approval of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter / year ending March 31, 2026. The exact date of the Board Meeting will be communicated in due course. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of the results. This information is also available on the Company's website.

  • ICDS Ltd closes trading window for insiders in compliance with SEBI regulations and Code of Conduct.
  • The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026 until 48 hours after the approval of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter / year ending March 31, 2026.
  • The exact date of the Board Meeting will be communicated in due course.
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of the results.
  • This information is available on the Company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICDS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CAPRIHANS] Bilcare Limited Increases Shareholding in Caprihans India Limited Through Conversion of Warrants
item.description:
Bilcare Limited, the promoter of Caprihans India Limited, has exercised its right of conversion of warrants during the financial year 2025-26. In the third tranche, they have been allotted 3,30,000 Equity Shares on conversion of 3,30,000 Convertible Warrants. This has resulted in an increase in Bilcare Limited's shareholding in Caprihans India Limited, the subsidiary company.

  • Bilcare Limited has exercised its right of conversion of warrants in Caprihans India Limited.
  • 3,30,000 Equity Shares have been allotted to Bilcare Limited in the third tranche.
  • This conversion has increased Bilcare Limited's shareholding in Caprihans India Limited.
  • The total shareholding of Bilcare Limited in Caprihans India Limited stands at 57.81%.
  • The conversion of warrants has been completed during the financial year 2025-26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAPRIHANS INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TAKE] TAKE Solutions Launches ‘Take.Health’ – An Intelligent Health Companion Targeting India’s $197 Billion Healthcare Opportunity
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TAKE Solutions Limited has launched Take.Health, an AI-driven digital health platform focused on preventive healthcare, personalized insights, and continuous health monitoring. The platform is designed to unlock a high-growth, high-impact opportunity at the intersection of digital health, AI and consumer wellness, while building scalable, recurring revenue streams across both retail and enterprise (workplace) segments. This initiative marks a transformational step in TAKE Solutions’ evolution, deeply aligned with the Government of India’s push to position AI as a critical development tool for societal good. The preventive healthcare market is expected to exceed USD 197 billion by 2030, driven by the increasing prevalence of lifestyle disorders, rising consumer focus on early diagnosis, continuous monitoring, and personalized health management, and rapid digital adoption supported by over 600 million smartphone users.

  • Launch of AI-driven digital health platform ‘Take.Health’
  • Focus on preventive healthcare, personalized insights, and continuous health monitoring
  • Targeting India’s $197 Billion healthcare opportunity
  • Building scalable, recurring revenue streams across retail and enterprise segments
  • Alignment with the Government of India’s push for AI in societal good

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TAKE SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SAKSOFT] Promoter Aditya Krishna Acquires Shares in Saksoft Ltd via Open Market
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Mr. Aditya Krishna, a promoter of Saksoft Limited, has acquired shares through the open market. Prior to the acquisition, Mr. Krishna held 20.98% shares and voting rights. Post-acquisition, his holding has increased to 21.00% shares and voting rights.

  • Mr. Aditya Krishna, a promoter of Saksoft Limited, has acquired shares through the open market.
  • Prior to the acquisition, Mr. Krishna held 20.98% shares and voting rights.
  • Post-acquisition, Mr. Krishna's holding has increased to 21.00% shares and voting rights.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAKSOFT LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VINATIORGA] Vinati Organics Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Vinati Organics Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons, including their immediate relatives and connected persons, from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting for the consideration and approval of the financial results will be intimated separately.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and connected persons from April 01, 2026
  • Closure to last until 48 hours after the announcement of Q4 and year-end financial results on March 31, 2026
  • Board meeting date for financial results approval to be announced separately
  • Applies to all Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, and Connected Persons
  • In accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct for Monitoring and Prevention of Insider Trading

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VINATI ORGANICS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SJCORP] Apex Advisors LLP Acquires 6.34% Equity Shares in SJ Corporation Ltd on Preferential Basis
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Apex Advisors LLP has acquired 27,50,000 equity shares, which is 6.34% of the total diluted share/voting capital, in SJ Corporation Ltd on a preferential basis. The acquisition was made on 20th March 2026. The total equity share capital of SJ Corporation Ltd before the acquisition was Rs. 55,900/- divided into 4,33,55,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each. After the acquisition, the total equity share capital of the company stands at Rs. 4,33,55,000/- divided into 4,33,55,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each.

  • Apex Advisors LLP acquired 27,50,000 equity shares, which is 6.34% of the total diluted share/voting capital, in SJ Corporation Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made on a preferential basis on 20th March 2026.
  • The total equity share capital of SJ Corporation Ltd before the acquisition was Rs. 55,900/- divided into 4,33,55,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each.
  • After the acquisition, the total equity share capital of the company stands at Rs. 4,33,55,000/- divided into 4,33,55,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SJ CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GSAUTO] Gurmukh Singh International Ltd Acquires Shares of GS Auto International Ltd Through Open Market
item.description:
Gurmukh Singh International Ltd and Persons Acting in Concert (PACs) have disclosed the purchase of equity shares of G S Auto International Limited through the open market. The acquisition includes shares carrying voting rights and warrants/convertible securities. The total voting rights of GS Auto International Ltd after the acquisition stands at 1,45,14,580 Equity Shares of Rs. 5/- each.

  • Gurmukh Singh International Ltd and PACs have purchased equity shares of GS Auto International Limited through the open market.
  • The acquisition includes shares carrying voting rights and warrants/convertible securities.
  • The total voting rights of GS Auto International Ltd after the acquisition stands at 1,45,14,580 Equity Shares of Rs. 5/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: G.S.AUTO INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Acquisitions
